subject: Physics
title: Mercury's Mysterious Orbit
description: Learn Mercury's Mysterious Orbit in one minute.

hook.text: Mercury's orbit wobbles in a way Newton's gravity couldn't explain. The mystery lasted decades.

buildup.text: Astronomers invented a phantom planet called Vulcan to explain the wobble. It didn't exist.

discovery.text: Einstein's general relativity predicted Mercury's wobble perfectly—no hidden planet needed.

twist.text: This was relativity's first triumph. Einstein felt heart palpitations when he saw the result.

climax.text: A tiny orbital wobble proved Newton's gravity was incomplete after 230 years of dominance.

punchline.text: No hidden planet. Just curved spacetime bending the orbit.

quiz.question: What caused Mercury's unexplained orbital wobble?
options: Curved spacetime as described by general relativity
